## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `dev` and this PR targets `dev`.
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` are clean.
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass, with tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] Public API additions carry TSDoc comments.
- [ ] `src/generated/poses.ts` was not hand-edited (it is generated by `scripts/generate-poses.ts`).
- [ ] Commits follow `type(scope): description`.
